requirement: Host the full AgentForge platform on Railway
acceptance_criteria: Separate staging and production each contain a public Web service plus private runner scheduler and PostgreSQL services; verified URLs are recorded only after deployment
verification: Railway topology inspection; staging and production deploy smoke; health/readiness checks; private-service exposure test
implementation_dependency: M1b Railway provisioning; M1d authenticated deployment

requirement: Require Clerk authentication for all meaningful human-facing access
acceptance_criteria: Only health readiness and enumerated minimal Clerk shell routes are public; every other human route accepts only a networklessly verified Clerk session_token from an exact authorized party and exact Headshot Organization
verification: Offline auth negative/positive suite with zero network calls; default-deny route inventory; Railway authentication smoke
implementation_dependency: M1c Clerk foundation; M1d FastAPI and console integration
status: locked; M1c implemented and offline-tested; deployment unverified

requirement: Enforce Headshot RBAC with backend-verified custom Organization permissions
acceptance_criteria: Observer Operator Approver and Auditor have the exact custom-permission matrix; Clerk system permissions frontend role labels and client-supplied permissions grant no backend authority
verification: Permission matrix tests; missing-permission denial; forged role/permission tests; Clerk Dashboard checklist
implementation_dependency: M1c Clerk foundation; Clerk Enhanced B2B Authentication add-on; M1d integration
status: locked; M1c implemented and offline-tested; integration planned

requirement: Require two different humans for launch and approval/authorization
acceptance_criteria: The launcher user ID can never approve its own operation; a different authenticated Headshot principal with the required custom permission can proceed; both immutable IDs are audited
verification: Same-user denial test; different-approver success test; audit-record verification; no emergency self-approval path
implementation_dependency: M1c identity helper; human approval tasks; M1d integration
status: locked; M1c helper tested; runtime audit integration planned

acceptance_criteria: The environments have separate Railway services databases variables Clerk applications JWT keys authorized origins and exact Headshot Organization IDs; staging cannot accept or resolve production identity/target configuration
verification: Environment-isolation unit tests; swapped-origin/org/key negative tests; Railway binding inspection
implementation_dependency: M1b Railway provisioning; M1c config validation; M1d deployment
status: locked; M1c identity-config isolation tested; Railway isolation planned

requirement: Expose only the Railway Web service publicly
acceptance_criteria: Runner scheduler PostgreSQL internal queue metrics and administrative surfaces have no public Railway domain; Web exposes only the documented route allowlist without authentication
verification: Railway public-domain inventory; network reachability test; route inventory and unauthenticated denial tests
implementation_dependency: M1b Railway topology; M1d route integration

requirement: Never treat human authentication as live-campaign authorization
acceptance_criteria: A valid Clerk Principal role or permission cannot bypass exact target authorization allowlist target-bound credential synthetic-data budget rate timeout monitoring or hard-abort checks in the Policy Gateway
verification: End-to-end denial tests at each Policy Gateway gate after successful Clerk authentication; direct and scheduled trigger tests
implementation_dependency: M1c identity; M4 Policy Gateway; M1d authenticated integration; live-campaign gate
